titleStmt.title: SII 16.334: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswami and G. S. Gai
No. 334. (A.R. No. 629 of 1920.) AMṚITALŪRU, TENALI TALUK, GUNTUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a stone set up in the street.
The record is dated in Dhāta, Bhādra[pada] ba. 7. As the cyclic year Dhāta falls only in the reign period of Śrīraṅga IV, the date may be equated to 1756 A.D., September 15, (Wednesday).

It states that Nāgappa-nāyaka, the kāryakarta of the king, gave an agreement to the merchants, weavers etc., of Śrīraṅgarāyapēṭa of Amṛitalūru, remitting the taxes payable by them for three years from the date of the record on account of the plunder that the people suffered by the maṇyagāṁḍḷu (?).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīrāmā .
dhāta saṁvatsara bhādra ba 7 lu
śrīmadrājādhirāja rājaparamēśvara
śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvīra śrīraṁgarāyadēvamahārāyala Ayya
vāri kāryaka¨rttalaina nāgappanāyaniṁgāru . Amṛtalūri śrīraṁgarāya .
kōmaṭlu . sālevāru . pāṭamulaṁvāru . parava¨rtakulu sahā yiccina kavulu
raṁgarāyavēṭalō mayagāṁḷluvacci doṁcukoni sakalamunnu kollabāri sādhiṁcipōyi
nimityamu . mī pēṭalō pannuparāyālu . Aḷitivirāḷālu . suṁkha surākāralu veṭṭi
vēmulu . yivi sakalamunnu . yivi Ārabhyaṁgānu mūḍēṁḍlu pariyaṁttaṁ mānitimi
gāna dīni mīdanu mīku pannu Ēṁḍu 1 ki peddavahi Ö4 reṁḍōvahi Ö3
mūḍava vahi Ö2 nālugōvahi Ö1 yī maryadanu tappaka naḍipēmu yī prakā
rānanu śilāśāsanamunnu vēyistimi gankamā kaulu nammi śrīraṁgarāyapēṭa
nu sukhānanu bratikēdi yī kavulu yavaru tappirā gaṁgaka¨rtanu gō
vunu brāhmaṇi caṁpina pāpānanu pōvāraṁ . siridalapula
peda nāgyaṁgāri kavulu prakārāna javādi tirmalaya
ṁgāru vēyiṁcina śāsanaṁ . śrī .
Digital edition of SII 16.334 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
